creator: vhtaylor38@gmail.com
text:
The Vuze application (/usr/ports/net-p2p/vuze) returns the following errors when you use openjvm6:

[11/28/12 1:01 AM] Log File Opened for Vuze 4.8.0.0
[01:01:46] [stderr] DEBUG::Wed Nov 28 01:01:46 PST 2012::com.aelitis.azureus.core.instancemanager.impl.AZInstanceManagerImpl::log::-1:
[01:01:46] [stderr]   java.net.SocketException: Invalid argument
[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at java.net.PlainDatagramSocketImpl.join(Native Method)
[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at java.net.AbstractPlainDatagramSocketImpl.joinGroup(AbstractPlainDatagramSocketImpl.java:192)
[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at java.net.MulticastSocket.joinGroup(MulticastSocket.java:383)

[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at org.gudy.azureus2.ui.swt.mainwindow.SWTThread$7.runSupport(Unknown Source)
[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at org.gudy.azureus2.core3.util.AERunnable.run(Unknown Source)
[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:679)
[01:01:46] [stderr] 
[01:01:46] [stderr] DEBUG::Wed Nov 28 01:01:46 PST 2012::com.aelitis.azureus.core.devices.impl.DeviceManagerUPnPImpl$2::log::-1:
[01:01:46] [stderr]   java.net.SocketException: Invalid argument
[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at java.net.PlainDatagramSocketImpl.join(Native Method)
[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at java.net.AbstractPlainDatagramSocketImpl.joinGroup(AbstractPlainDatagramSocketImpl.java:192)
[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at java.net.MulticastSocket.joinGroup(MulticastSocket.java:383)

[01:01:46] [stderr] 	at com.aelitis.net.upnp.impl.ssdp.SSDPCore.getSingleton(Unknown Source)

Fix: 

Remove openjvm and install diablo-jdk and there are no more errors
